subcodes.first_line: This sacred Tree hath been raised up in truth, and upon its branches the Pen of Eternity warbleth with wondrous melodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه شجره القدس ارتفعت بالحق و یغن علی افنانها قلم البقا بالحان بدیعا و ینفق
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
